title: The Taste of Salt on Another Planet
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A marine biologist on a water-world colony falls in love with the alien ocean's sentient plankton swarm via a translator that maps its electrical fields to human emotions, but a corporate terraforming team plans to desalinate the entire ocean, which would kill her lover.
long_description: A marine biologist on a water-world colony falls in love with the alien ocean's sentient plankton swarm via a translator that maps its electrical fields to human emotions, but a corporate terraforming team plans to desalinate the entire ocean, which would kill her lover.
